import py_compile, sys
files = [
    'license/__init__.py',
    'license/machine_code.py',
    'license/verifier.py',
    'license/cache_manager.py',
    'license/activation.py',
    'license/api_client.py',
    'ui/pay_dialog.py',
    'ui/main_window.py',
]

for f in files:

        print\(f'OK  {f}'\)
    except py_compile.PyCompileError as e:
        print\(f'ERR {f}: {e}'\)
        ok = False
sys.exit\(0 if ok else 1\)
" 2>&1)

from ui.widgets import AudioToggleButton

assert rc.selected_monitors == [1]

")
